case_title: MCCARTHY, PATRICK vs. WADE, JESSICA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, JESSICA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-19-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-30-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1996, CONTINUED TO OCT-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-21-1996, OSC TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY FAILED TO APPEAR TODAY AND FAILED TO FILE AN ENTRY OF DEFAULT. HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
